title: No More Vignette
description: Removes the pesky vignette from your screen
body:
## Removes vignette. 



**What is vignette? you may ask.**

Vignette is the unobtrusive blur on the sides of your screen so it feels more natural but some people dont like it so i've decided to remove it.

Follow me on Twitter at @CrumbleToasting

Subscribe to me on YouTube at @CrumbleToastings

Thank you for choosing me, These Recource packs are made with a lot of love!
